name: abrdn Physical Palladium Shares xStock
description: abrdn Physical Palladium Shares xStock (PALLx) is a tracker certificate issued as a freely transferable token on selected blockchains. PALLx tracks the price of abrdn Physical Palladium Shares ETF. PALLx is designed to give eligible investors regulatory-compliant access to the stock price of abrdn Physical Palladium Shares ETF, whilst maintaining the benefits of blockchain technology.
